## PR Declarations

Please check the boxes `[x]` that apply to this Pull Request.

### Verification & Style
- [ ] **I confirm** that I compiled the code successfully on supported platforms.
- [ ] **I confirm** that I manually verified the new functionality or bug fix.
- [ ] **I confirm** that I followed the project’s coding conventions.
- [ ] **I confirm** that no new warnings or errors are introduced.

### AI Usage Declaration
*Please select exactly ONE of the following regarding AI assistance:*
- [ ] No AI assistance was used.
- [ ] AI was used for **partial assistance** (e.g., generating boilerplate, refactoring).
- [ ] AI was used for **full generation** (e.g., drafting entire functions or files).

*If you selected partial or full AI assistance, you must also confirm:*
- [ ] I have thoroughly reviewed, understood, and validated all AI-generated code.


## Description
Explain the changes you made and why. Include context, motivation, and any relevant background.

## Related Issues
*Link to any relevant issues or discussions here.*

## Additional Notes
Add screenshots, benchmarks, or documentation updates if applicable.
